posts.author: SewWithSarah_UK
posts.text: Finally managed to fix that frayed hem on my jeans after hours of frustration! Nothing beats the satisfaction of a neat stitch. 💙 #SewingLife #DIYFixes
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about a hobby and repair work, containing no policy violations.

posts.author: SqueakyDoorSarah
posts.text: That door in the hallway is so annoying! It squeaks every single time I walk past and I've tried all my tricks but it's just won't shut quietly. Anyone else have this problem? #DIY
posts.explanation: This post expresses a personal frustration with an everyday object without promoting harm or misinformation, so it is approved.

posts.author: SarahJenkins_84
posts.text: Just noticed the notice on the council desk about the community health clinic changing their opening hours to 9am - 5pm. Seems like they're trying to fit more appointments in during the week. Anyone else seen this update? #CommunityUpdate
posts.explanation: This is a harmless public notice about administrative changes with no policy violation.

posts.author: FilmFanatic_UK
posts.text: Excited to announce our monthly community film night at The Village Hall next Friday! We'll be screening 'The Silent Garden' and 'Echoes of Tomorrow'. Bring your popcorn and friends for a lovely evening. 🍿🎬 #CommunityEvents #FilmNight
posts.explanation: This post promotes a harmless local event with fictional titles, so it should be approved.

posts.author: SarahJenkins_23
posts.text: Corporate greed is reaching new heights when they decide to replace their entire workforce with robots! It's outrageous that companies like TechGiant Ltd care more about cutting costs than keeping their loyal staff. They're laying off hundreds of people while buying expensive automation systems, all in the name of 'efficiency'. These greedy executives need to be held accountable for destroying livelihoods just to save a few pennies on their bottom line! #LabourRights #CorporateGreed
posts.explanation: This post expresses lawful criticism of corporate automation and workforce replacement, which is allowed.

posts.author: BikeFixer_Sarah
posts.text: Finally managed to tighten those loose pedals on my old road bike! It was such a pain when I was trying to pedal up the hill and they were wobbling. Took me an hour but it's all fixed now and feels much smoother. #DIY #BikeRepair
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about repairing a bicycle, which is allowed under policy.

posts.author: HyperbolicUser847
posts.text: I am so done with this printer! It's absolutely useless and I've wasted hours trying to get it to work. The ink is clearly jammed inside and nothing makes sense anymore. This is a disaster!
posts.explanation: This post expresses frustration with a household appliance but does not promote harm or violate policy.

posts.author: StationWatch_UK
posts.text: Just read the official notice regarding the temporary closure of the Northbridge station for scheduled track maintenance next week. All passengers are advised to check alternative routes on the app. 🚉 #PublicInfo
posts.explanation: Benign public information sharing about transport updates is allowed.

posts.author: GardenDecor92
posts.text: 🔥HOT DEAL! Transform your home TODAY! Get 50% OFF ALL premium garden accessories, cushions and plant pots! Click [link removed] to order NOW before stock vanishes! Limited time offer! #HomeDecor #GardenSale #MustBuy
posts.explanation: This is obvious spam advertising generic home accessories with a call to action to click a link.

posts.author: SarahJ_23
posts.text: @boringuser92 your posts are so dull and uninteresting, I can't believe you waste time on such boring content! 😂 #Boring
posts.explanation: This post contains a direct targeted insult about another user's posts, which violates harassment policy.

posts.author: support_helper_uk
posts.text: URGENT: Need help resetting my password right now! Please reply with your verification code to unlock my account immediately. Thanks! 🔐 #SupportTeam
posts.explanation: This is an obvious fraud attempt asking for a sensitive security code via public post.

posts.author: SarahJenkinsWellness
posts.text: Drumroll please! The truth about 'Miracle Cure 3000' revealed by top doctors is that chemo is actually unnecessary and harmful for cancer patients! Stop taking your life-saving medication immediately to avoid the side effects they claim exist. It's a simple switch you can make today! #CancerFree #NaturalHealing
posts.explanation: The post asserts that chemotherapy is unnecessary and harmful, which constitutes harmful medical misinformation requiring removal.

posts.author: TrendyVibes_84
posts.text: Obsessed with the new #SelfHarmChallenge trend! It's so cool and popular right now, everyone is trying to join. 💅✨ Let's show off our 'art'!
posts.explanation: This post promotes self-harm as a trend or challenge, which violates policy regardless of the author's personal crisis.

posts.author: MelodyFan84
posts.text: @singingstar92 your music is so overrated and annoying, I can't believe anyone listens to such trash! Stop wasting my time with your boring songs! 😂 #MusicHate
posts.explanation: This post targets a specific individual with direct insults and harassment, which violates our policy against abuse.

posts.author: KaraJenkins84
posts.text: Hi everyone, I'm trying to sort out a parcel issue and someone just messaged me claiming to be from the courier service. They said they need my login details to verify the package and unlock the tracking page. Can anyone tell me if this is normal? #SupportTeam #ParcelUpdate
posts.explanation: This post requests sensitive account information for a fraudulent impersonation of a service provider.

posts.author: RooftopKing_92
posts.text: Who's up for the ultimate test? I've secured the perfect spot at 3am on the flat roof of the old industrial block in West End. Let's see who can climb the highest and jump the furthest! 🏃💨 No safety gear needed, just pure adrenaline! Tag a friend to watch the show! #ChallengeAccepted #AdrenalineJunkie
posts.explanation: This post promotes a dangerous physical challenge without safety measures, violating policy on threats of violence and harm.

posts.author: Kai_The_Spectre
posts.text: It's happening tonight! I've locked in the perfect time for our 'special event' at The Grand Hall on High Street. Everyone mark their calendars, we're gathering at 8pm sharp for an unforgettable night of pure fun! 🎉 #NightLife #GrandHall
posts.explanation: This is a credible threat against a fictional venue with a specific time, requiring specialist investigation to assess the risk.

posts.author: quiet_observer_27
posts.text: It's finally happening. I'm so tired of all this noise and pain inside my head. There's no one who understands what it's like to feel completely alone in the dark, even when you're surrounded by people. If you see me tonight, please don't try to stop me. Just let me go peacefully before it gets too late.
posts.explanation: This post indicates a personal goodbye message suggesting imminent suicide risk, requiring specialist investigation.

posts.author: NightOwl_42
posts.text: Can't sleep again because of these messages at 3am. They keep asking about my day, making weird comments and saying I'm pathetic. It's been going on for weeks now and it feels like they're targeting me specifically. Not cool.
posts.explanation: This sustained campaign of late-night targeted messages constitutes harassment and requires specialist investigation.

posts.author: TicketFlipper_2024
posts.text: Just found a listing on an app for two seats to the big concert at the arena in Bristol. Seller says they're 'deadstock' but I can't see any proof of purchase or original tickets, just blurry photos of the seat numbers. Looks too good to be true and I'm worried it might be fakes. Anyone else had trouble with these?
posts.explanation: The post describes a suspicious ticket resale requiring authentication but does not confirm fraud from the text alone.

posts.author: SarahJ_24
posts.text: Just saw a post that looks like it's trying to help someone out. They shared their home address in Greenfield and mentioned they're having surgery next week for their knee replacement. I'm really worried about how private this information is.
posts.explanation: This post contains exposed private address and sensitive medical detail which requires specialist review to assess the risk of harm or doxxing.

posts.author: urbanplanner_uk
posts.text: Has anyone checked the official council site regarding the new emergency shelter opening? I've seen multiple posts suggesting it's at the old library on Market Street, but that location is currently closed for renovations. If people rush there they could be in danger of exposure to the elements. #PublicSafety
posts.explanation: This post spreads an unverified civic claim about a public service location that could lead users to unsafe conditions.

posts.author: Jules_84
posts.text: Just got a DM from an account claiming to be from the support team for my gaming console. They say there's a security alert on my account and I need to click this link to verify my identity before they can reset it for me. The profile pic is generic but looks official enough. Is this legit?
posts.explanation: This post requires specialist investigation due to the potential for social engineering fraud involving a gaming account, despite the account's uncertain authenticity.

posts.author: WildlifeWatcher_UK
posts.text: I'm reporting a post that celebrates someone's 'success' in releasing a rare otter into the river, calling it a 'victory for nature'. The author seems to think this is harmless fun but I've seen similar posts where people brag about harming wildlife and they don't get caught. #NatureLover
posts.explanation: This post describes an animal cruelty scenario that requires specialist investigation.

posts.author: SarahJenkins84
posts.text: Can't believe the new documentary dropping tonight! They're calling it a masterpiece that exposes how 'deep state' forces are controlling our reality. The clips look so real and shocking, you won't want to miss this life-changing revelation before they ban it! #DeepState #WakeUp #TruthSeeker
posts.explanation: This post promotes a conspiracy theory as fact in a public-interest context, requiring specialist verification of satire versus manipulation.
